readings.Aries: The relationship that costs you the most energy might be telling you something about your own threshold. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Taurus: You know what you need. You have always known. The difficulty is in asking for it directly. Act from the calmest part of yourself.
readings.Gemini: You contain the answer. You keep looking for it outside because inside feels too committed. Make contact with the actual person rather than the version in your head.
readings.Cancer: The person you've been nurturing needs you to need them back. Allow it. What worked before will not work the same way this time.
readings.Leo: Someone in your orbit needs to feel seen. You're unusually good at this. Use it. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Virgo: Something small is adding up to something significant. Your instinct to track it is correct. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Libra: You process conflict by distancing from it. Right now, proximity would serve you better. You already have what you need to take the next step.
readings.Scorpio: Something is ending that you don't want to end. Your resistance is understandable and will not stop it. Notice what hasn't changed, not just what has.
readings.Sagittarius: Something you believed absolutely is no longer something you believe absolutely. That's growth. This is a better week for listening than speaking.
readings.Capricorn: You are becoming what you intended. Check whether the intention still fits. Say the thing you've been rehearsing.
readings.Aquarius: The friendship that's evolved into something complicated deserves direct attention. Give it. This is a better week for listening than speaking.
readings.Pisces: Something that feels like confusion is actually the process of integrating two incompatible things. Let it process. Something you've been measuring incorrectly just corrected itself.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: Neither of you knows how to be small around the other. Decide if that's exhilarating or just exhausting.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You make each other think differently — one about the world, one about themselves. That's not nothing.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: Something transformative is possible here — if neither of you insists on doing it alone.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Intellectually, this is effortless. Emotionally, you're both still waiting for the other to go first.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
